intro: Ayenia oranensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the "Oran Ayenia" or "Argentine ayenia." This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, pain, and fever, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The bioactive constituents of Ayenia oranensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Ayenia oranensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used to make topical creams and ointments for the treatment of skin conditions and wounds.
